raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_2 (light brown) is resting on top of box_1 and its left, right and front sides are clear of obstacles, allowing both end-effectors to approach from opposite lateral sides. Adequate clearance exists between box_2 and surrounding objects for the arms to close in without collision.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is firmly held between both end-effectors and lifted a few centimeters above box_1, freeing the top surface of box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table area right of the stacked boxes",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "Robot is holding box_2 and the target region on the tabletop to the right of box_1 is clear and large enough (≥30×30 cm) to accommodate the box.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is placed flat on the designated clear area of the table, no longer obstructing box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_1’s top is now unobstructed after removal of box_2, and its lateral sides are accessible. There is enough clearance around box_1 for both arms to approach from the sides without colliding with box_2 or the table edge.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 (dark brown) is securely grasped between the two end-effectors and lifted off the tabletop, completing the ‘pick up’ task."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_2 (light brown) is resting on top of box_1 and its left, right and front sides are clear of obstacles, allowing both end-effectors to approach from opposite lateral sides. Adequate clearance exists between box_2 and surrounding objects for the arms to close in without collision.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is firmly held between both end-effectors and lifted a few centimeters above box_1, freeing the top surface of box_1.

parsed_json.Target: table area right of the stacked boxes
parsed_json.Precondition: Robot is holding box_2 and the target region on the tabletop to the right of box_1 is clear and large enough (≥30×30 cm) to accommodate the box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is placed flat on the designated clear area of the table, no longer obstructing box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_1’s top is now unobstructed after removal of box_2, and its lateral sides are accessible. There is enough clearance around box_1 for both arms to approach from the sides without colliding with box_2 or the table edge.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 (dark brown) is securely grasped between the two end-effectors and lifted off the tabletop, completing the ‘pick up’ task.
